## Type of change

<!-- Check all that apply -->

- [ ] `feat` - new feature or DSL addition
- [ ] `fix` - bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` - code change with no behavior difference
- [ ] `docs` - documentation only
- [ ] `chore` - deps, CI, build config
- [ ] `perf` - performance improvement
- [ ] `style` - formatting only

---

## Checklist

- [ ] `mvn clean package` passes locally
- [ ] All new public API has KDoc
- [ ] No new dependencies added (or discussed in the PR description)
- [ ] No raw Pl3xMap types exposed in public API
- [ ] `requireReady()` guard is present on any new public-facing method
- [ ] `.gitignore` / credentials untouched
- [ ] Branch is based on `dev`, not `main`
